project.name: C-exe Maven archetype
project.description:
-------------------------------------------------------- C-exe Maven archetype --------------------------------------------------------
Archetype to generate the basic structure of a simple project in language c. Example of use: This command generates the test-project project:
mvn archetype:generate \ -DarchetypeGroupId=org.gjs.maven.archetypes \ -DarchetypeArtifactId=gjs-c-exe-archetype \ -DarchetypeVersion=1.0.0-SNAPSHOT \ -DshortName=test-project \ -DgroupId=org.gjs.test \ -DartifactId=test-project \ -Dpackage=org.gjs.test \ -Dversion=1.0.0-SNAPSHOT \ -Dlog=y \ -Dparameters=1
==================================================================================== Archetype Parameters:
* shortName: Name of the project. Always lowercase. Allows two words separated by a hyphen.
* groupId: The group of the project artifact.
* artifactId: The name of the project artifact. Default is cpp-lib. Not required.
* version: The project version. Default is 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT. Not required.
* log: Activates log. Values y/n. Default is y. Not required.
* parameters: Number of parameters of the program. Default is 0. Not required.
====================================================================================
